subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath arisen to serve the Cause of God and remained steadfast when the clamor of them that have disbelieved in God, the Lord, was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن قام علی امر الله و استقام اذ ارتفع ضوضاء الذین کفروا بالله رب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @naming of children; of individuals, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @role and station of women, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
